summary: NAS100 broke above ATH 29,782, now at 29,872 (+1.06%, +313pts). D1 structure bullish with confirmed new HH. H4 breakout through previous FVG resistance. M15: No valid entry yet — not in Kill Zone, price already extended. Wait for NY AM pullback to 29,700-29,750 for long entry. Post-holiday thin volume reduces conviction.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: BULLISH — Price broke above ATH 29,782, now trading 29,872 (+1.06%). Daily structure shifted to bullish with confirmed new HH above prior ATH. Long-term uptrend remains intact. Price above all major MAs from prior analysis. SSL at 28,596 held as swing low. Breakout above 29,782 validates bullish continuation. Draw on Liquidity: 30,000 psychological + external BSL above. Dealing Range (28,596→29,782): Price at 99.4%+ (extreme premium) — old range breached, new range forming. Post-holiday thin volume (Memorial Day) may amplify moves but reduces conviction.
ict_analysis.h4_context: BULLISH BREAKOUT — Price broke through bearish FVG zone 29,012-29,603 that was previously resistance. Old bearish FVG mitigated on upside breakout. New dealing range forming: base ~29,108 (May 21 low) to high ~29,995 (today's intraday high). Key levels: 29,705 (old R1, now potential support), 29,559 (prev close / last price), 29,385 (PDL). CRT candle: Today's H4 breakout candle needs to close above 29,782 to confirm ATH breakout is valid. If price holds above 29,705 on retest, bullish continuation toward 30,000 is expected.
ict_analysis.m15_status: NO VALID ENTRY YET — Current time ~18:52 HKT (10:52 UTC). Not in active Kill Zone (London passed, NY AM starts at 21:00 HKT). Price has already moved +313 pts from prev close — entering now is chasing, not trading. Wait for NY AM Kill Zone (21:00-00:00 HKT) for potential pullback entry: If price pulls back to 29,700-29,750 (old resistance→support flip) during NY Kill Zone, look for M15 bullish OB formation for long entry. SL below 29,650, TP 30,000+. If no pullback and price continues higher without Kill Zone confirmation → SKIP (chasing).

recommendation: WAIT — Bias is Bullish but entry quality insufficient. Price +313pts from prev close = chasing. Need NY AM Kill Zone pullback to 29,700-29,750 for valid M15 OB long entry. Walker confidence 62 (< 70 threshold), ORB 55 (< 60 threshold). Decision matrix says NO_GO. Stand aside unless clear pullback setup emerges.
